cause_analysis.narrative: ALISADOS MIAMI DANIELA ALZATE - Salón de belleza Miami Florida churned on 2026-02-21 after 322 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 29-day silence starting 2025-12-25.

messages.body: Hi,  I hope you are doing well.  My name is Tanvi Mittal, and I am a Senior Growth Specialist at Zoca. I’ve been reviewing your account and would love the opportunity to connect with you for a brief feedback call to understand your experience with Zoca and see how we can improve.  Please let me know a suitable time to …

Hello Daniela! Merry Christmas!🎄🎁  Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with love, laughter, and all the things that bring you happiness.   Thank you for your trust and support throughout the year. It’s been a pleasure working with you. Here’s to a prosperous and wonderful New Year ahead! 🌟  Enjoy the festivities…
